calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk-Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Terrell Hamilton appears in pro per. Respondent, Limin He appears in pro per with Cantonese interpreter Vickie Yeung.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Renne.

Previous exhibits handed back to respondent, but then returned to the Judge.

EXHR (1) Photo
EXHR (2) Acupuncture invoice
EXHR (3) Billing statement

11:09am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
